[{"key":"0.27463270207325056","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1155/h_572/50364/103682/2024/9/24/293188.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_973/h_745/50364/103682/2024/9/24/316155.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.37b6bed37cbd7","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉/厄影修罗"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者罗喉，身份编码E07-111142，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"活跃于艾尔特利斯的神秘人士，经营着名为「空」的古董店。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"店如其名，「空」无贵重之物，放眼望去尽是些下等货，但他总有办法将它们售卖出去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"现为E07街区最受欢迎的「情报贩子」，信奉「等价交换」的准则。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据说走进「空」的客人，离开时都付出了「代价」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"总是笑容满面，给人以热情好客的印象，实际上不知道在背地里谋划着什么诡计，话语之间恐怕也多为真假难辨的巧言。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"是相处时需要格外留意的家伙。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":" mpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/960068.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【万般皆上品，只要有所值。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"庭院一隅，四方天地，唯有顶上一点阳光落下来，仿若一个不封顶的「笼」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉屏退了所有的侍者。看着所有人离开，他这才转过头，看向了旁边的假山"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「贵客大驾光临，小店招待不周。」罗喉笑着用手中烟斗轻轻敲了敲檀木桌面，如同乐者思索节拍，「只是您委托之事····眼下时机还未成熟，我也很是为难。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「喵？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你想要恢复成以前的样子，以小店的能力而言，不算什么难事·····」罗喉深深吸了口烟斗，而后缓缓吐出几个烟圈，「就是这代价····」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「喵！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"黑猫一跃而上了罗喉的肩膀，他吐出了最后一个烟圈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「既然阁下这么爽快，那在下自然也不会推脱！！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「三日之后我会为你完成心愿。不过，我亦会收取我认为合理的报酬。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「喵！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【所见即所得，一诺值千金。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「海因里希先生，您应该知道，我这只是个古董店。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉看了一眼眼前阴翳的男人，然后若无其事地敲了敲自己的烟斗。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「规矩我知道，开价吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哦？看来是个上道的客人呢，那要看看，你能提供什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「无所谓，除了能力以外，你看上什么，都可以尽管拿走。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这么爽快的客人，我已经很久没有见到了呢。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过，在下从来不是贪心的人，只会取走符合价码的东西，不会让客人吃亏。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你要什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「事后，我需要你的一只眼睛。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「眼睛？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没错，就是你的一只眼睛。」罗喉吐了口烟。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「成交！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那我要的东西呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我已经替你准备好了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉微笑着，然后用自己的烟斗敲了敲眼前的桌子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一会儿后，海因里希就收到了罗喉发过去的邮件。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「她叫41号，是现在唯一能帮助你的人。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【所愿所偿，万物皆有代价。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「要想补全缺失的人格，最需要的是与其相关联的人格记忆数据。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿休看着眼前的罗喉，然后又看了一眼躺在装置上的黑猫。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没有这些，一切都是空话。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿休看着罗喉。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我早就猜到了，不然也不会找你。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「看看这是什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉拿出了一根透明的玻璃试管。试管中间，漂浮着一串闪烁着不同颜色的泪珠。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是……梦泪。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿休不可思议地看着罗喉。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这就是之前那位女士所应付的代价吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没错。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉笑着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「41号从极夜之都收集到的“梦泪”里面，蕴含着当初极夜之都大部分人的记忆残片，其中就蕴含着大量关于蒂芙尼的人格记忆数据。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"被召集而来的技术人员们关上了实验室的大门，有条不紊地进入了工作。在门关上前的那一瞬，罗喉看见那根玻璃试管被安置于黑猫上方，犹如童话里施展魔法的长杖。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「该是完成心愿的时刻了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉为自己沏了一杯新茶，侍者燃起了香，待到香气满厅之时，实验室的大门终于被打开——"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"此时，在阿休的身后，一位身姿曼妙的年轻女性款步向外走来，然后在罗喉身前的十几步远的位置停下。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她的模样与极夜之都记录中的别无二致，但眉眼间似乎多了几分冰冷。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"罗喉看着眼前的少女，微微一笑。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「欢迎归来，蒂芙尼小姐。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.f8dcdd4fc6eec8","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"坦克，输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 242|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，防御加成，爆伤 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"pve在高难配合拂秋，善雅，蝰蛇等角色在可以长线战斗的对局中表现不错，pvp也是兼具坦克与输出的t0角色"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bd0365cc71bf2","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12浴血+8荆棘+6巨壁屏障"}]}]}},{"key":"0.c2af48c407ab3","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"匠"}]}]}},{"key":"0.c429243e5efd38","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":""}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/327021.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"653620612245046174","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"JJCHWdvkN7wakMtx","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
